outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed GEX profile: 0DTE positive stabilizes intraday, but Weekly/Monthly negative GEX amplifies multi-day moves. Expect volatility if spot breaks 24300.
outlook.summary: Spot trapped between Monthly PUT WALL (24000) and MAX PAIN/CALL WALL (24300). 0DTE reverse smirk confirms bullish short-term bias, but negative GEX in further expiries warns of volatility. Monthly Max Pain at 24300 acts as primary magnetic target. High volume on 0DTE PUTS at 23700 and 23600 suggests strong defensive positioning.

levels.motivazione: Monthly Max Pain + dominant CALL OI (966) with massive VOL (1040). Primary magnetic target less than 0.5% from spot. Dealers will defend this level.

Significant PUT OI in 0DTE (261) and Monthly (335). Deep support confluence zone.
